CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_exceeded
CRITICAL.message: The data pipeline has not run within the last 24 hours, leading to stale data.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the pipeline failure immediately.

CRITICAL.name: data_quality_below_threshold
CRITICAL.message: The data quality percentage is below the required 99.9%, leading to potential inaccuracies.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data quality issues immediately.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the bounds of 17 to 25
CRITICAL.message: The row count is outside the expected bounds of 17 to 25, indicating potential data completeness issues.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the row count anomaly immediately.

WARNING.name: pipeline_runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: The pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit, which may delay the dashboard update.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the pipeline performance and optimize if necessary.

WARNING.name: data_quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.message: The data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%, which may lead to minor inaccuracies.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the data quality and investigate if it continues to decline.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: One merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%, indicating potential issues.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the failure rate spike for the affected merchant.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: New payment method detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the new payment method for future reference.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25
INFO.message: The daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25, but within the acceptable range.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count to ensure it remains within the acceptable range.
